revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901112e

Updating training is tailor made training following a training needs analysis indicating that member(s) of VTS Personnel need additional training. Updating training may be required after a break in service, unsatisfactory operational performance or other circumstances leading to a reduced level of competence.

Source: 
IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel
IALA Model Course V‐103/5 - Revalidation Process for VTS Qualification and Certification
